description: Recherche sur la supply chain, fabrication et opérations

userStories.title: Stratégie de fabrication
userStories.notes: ODM to OEM path validated. China (Shenzhen) primary for cost. Europe/USA for premium/medical. AQL-based QC with IPC standards.

userStories.title: Sourcing composants
userStories.notes: LCSC for prototypes, DigiKey/Mouser for quality. Second sources identified for all critical components. Lead times 1-6 weeks depending on component. Payment 30-100% upfront based on volume.

userStories.title: Assemblage et intégration
userStories.notes: JLCPCB/PCBWay for PCBA. 7-step assembly process defined. AOI + ICT + functional testing. Cost: $8-20/unit depending on volume.

userStories.title: Logistique et distribution
userStories.notes: ShipBob/ShipMonk for 3PL. Multi-region strategy at scale. RMA process with replace vs repair economics. Shipping $2.50-12/order depending on speed.

userStories.title: Scalabilité
userStories.notes: 4-phase plan: 100 units ($25K) → 1K ($120K) → 5K ($350K) → 10K+ ($600K). Bottlenecks: cash flow, tooling, component supply. Timeline 3-4 months per phase.
